comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: Shouldn't this handle the case where `entry` is undefined? A cache miss would throw here.

comments.author: reviewer2
comments.body: +1, and why warm the cache eagerly at startup?

reviewThreads.fixPlan: Add an early return when `store.get(key)` returns undefined, before the `expiresAt` check, so a cache miss returns undefined instead of throwing.

comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: Is the cache size configurable? I don't see it documented.

issueComments.author: reviewer2
issueComments.body: Can you also update the changelog before merging?
issueComments.fixPlan: Add an entry under Unreleased in CHANGELOG.md describing the new caching layer.
